name: q3edit
description: Author and inspect live Quake III maps through Q3Edit's MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Author live Quake III maps with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex directly to a running Q3Edit editor for revision-safe geometry, entity, texture, validation, compilation, and visual-review workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create a box in my current Q3Edit map.
Fix the texture on my selected Q3Edit brush.
Review my current Quake III map layout.
